description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Linux Packages that runs on push to master, linux branches and tags. Use a matrix strategy to build Linux packages for different environments, including Ubuntu and CentOS with various CUDA versions. For each job, prepare the build environment, checkout code and dependencies, set up Docker Buildx, cache Docker layers, login to DockerHub, build and push a Docker image, and then build and upload a Linux package as a release asset.
